english_news.title: Micron stock jumps 12% as soaring prices from memory crunch lead to quadrupling of revenue
english_news.summary: Micron's quarterly earnings report follows a 700% surge in the memory maker's stock price over the past year.

english_news.title: White House requests $87.6 billion supplemental spending for Iran war, farm aid
english_news.summary: White House Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought asked House Speaker Mike Johnson for billions in extra spending for the Iran war.

english_news.title: Qualcomm stock pops 15% after chipmaker almost doubles projection for 2029 non-handset revenue
english_news.summary: Qualcomm's primary business has been smartphones, which accounted for two-thirds of the company's product revenue in it's most recent quarter.

english_news.title: Trump meets defense CEOs as Iran operations strain U.S. missile stockpiles
english_news.summary: The White House is pressing major defense firms to expand missile and munitions output as Iran talks and weapons stockpile concerns put new pressure on the Pentagon’s industrial base.

english_news.title: Trump cancels signing of bipartisan housing bill ahead of tense meeting with GOP senators
english_news.summary: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled the signing of a bill aimed at increasing housing affordability an hour before he was due at the Capitol for the ceremony.

english_news.title: Federal Reserve says U.S. banks can withstand $708 billion in losses amid overhaul of capital rules
english_news.summary: The Fed's annual exercise comes at a pivotal moment for bank regulation because, unlike previous years, the results will not affect capital requirements.

english_news.title: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of campaign to 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extract AI capabilities
english_news.summary: The letter, which was obtained by CNBC, claims Alibaba carried out "the largest known distillation attack on Anthropic to date."

english_news.title: JPMorgan Chase unveils $50 billion buyback, Goldman Sachs raises dividend after Fed stress test
english_news.summary: The announcements followed the release of the Federal Reserve's annual stress test, which found that all 32 large banks weathered a hypothetical recession.

english_news.title: France, UK and Spain see record temperatures as heatwave grips western Europe
english_news.summary: Tens of millions of people are grappling with punishing temperatures, which have led to red heat alerts across the continent.

english_news.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
english_news.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

english_news.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
english_news.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

english_news.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
english_news.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

english_news.title: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
english_news.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

english_news.title: France confirms first Ebola case
english_news.summary: The French doctor had been working in DR Congo, where more than 260 people are known to have died.

english_news.title: French woman allegedly held captive by husband for 12 years rescued in Pakistan
english_news.summary: Yasmina alleges she was held along with her five children, and they were all cut off from the outside world.

english_news.title: Colombia's left-wing presidential candidate concedes defeat
english_news.summary: Senator Iván Cepeda was beaten by right-wing businessman Abelardo de la Espriella by less than a percentage point.

华东医药：全资子公司获得注射用HDM2005药物临床试验批准通知书
36氪获悉，华东医药公告，全资子公司杭州中美华东制药有限公司收到国家药监局核准签发的《药物临床试验批准通知书》，注射用HDM2005联合PD-1单抗和AD用于治疗经典型霍奇金淋巴瘤的临床试验申请获批。该药物为靶向ROR1的ADC药物，目前正围绕恶性肿瘤开展多适应症临床开发。本次获批将提升公司在肿瘤治疗领域的核心竞争力，但药物从临床试验到上市存在不确定性，对近期业绩无重大影响。

chinese_news.title: 完成数亿元新融资，影眸科技 Hyper3D 让 3D 生成进入“思考时代”丨36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸

编辑｜张雨忻

2026 年开年来，3D 生成模型赛道相当热闹。

今年第一季度，影眸科技发布首个 3D 编辑模型 Rodin Gen-2 Edit，让 AI 3D 模型第一次可编辑；今年 6 月，VAST 官宣了新一轮融资，Meshy 也紧随其后，宣称自己发布了全球首款 3D AI Agent。

近日，影眸科技——这支扎根学术圈、创业早、年轻的 3D 模型团队，带着最新的技术研究成果，以及新一轮融资，再添了一把火。

这支团队创立于 2020 年，创始人兼 CEO 吴迪、和联合创始人兼 CTO 张启煊以及另外两位联合创始人张龙文、曾初啸均来自上海科技大学。团队约 60 人，平均年龄不到 25 岁。

尽管看起来年轻，但在 B 端市场，影眸几乎站稳了头部地

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：诶? AI! AI这个月、AI这一年、AI这五年｜36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以“今年盛夏”为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些“少数人” 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

以下为对话内容，经36氪整理编辑：

chinese_news.title: 仙工智能的过山车：暗盘破发7%、首日冲高38%
chinese_news.summary:
本文约1100字，建议阅读3分钟

作者 | 彭孝秋

6月24日，仙工智能（06106.HK）正式在港交所敲钟上市，开盘平开，报101.6港元，随后一路拉升，最高冲到140.50（+38.3%）。之后回落，截至发稿报115.70港元，仍涨13.88%。振幅38.29%，成交5.33亿，市值127.8亿港元。

按这个市值算，其去年4.42亿元收入，静态市销率已升到约25倍，成为港股估值最贵的机器人新股。全球AMR第一的极智嘉约9倍，

chinese_news.title: AI × OPC的新可能：一个人，就是一支队伍｜2026WAVES
chinese_news.summary:
2026年6月16日，36氪2026 WAVES 新浪潮大会在广州番禺良仓新造创意园开幕。以下这场圆桌论坛是大会首日下午的收官议题，探讨 AI 时代 OPC（One Person Company）的真实生态。

八九十年代，一辆三轮车、一个摊位，就能撑起一门生意。今天的 OPC 看起来形似，但底层逻辑已经彻底不同。

过去个体户的杠杆是体力、经验和地理位置，本质上是基于本地的 LBS 服务，脱不开那个具体的摊位。今天 OPC 的杠杆是代码和媒体——边际成本几乎为零的杠杆，加上 AI 带来的生产力平权，让一个人第一次拥有了接近公司的交付能力。

这场圆桌汇集了 OPC 生态的上中下游：已经跑出商业闭环的 OPC 创业者、每天和年轻创业者打交道的高校创新创业负责人、云计算和底层算力平台的专家。几个值得关注的行业趋势在讨论中浮出水面：

第一，云的用户画像正在发生迁移，云平台的产品逻辑也在随之重构。阿里云今年2月的用户调研发现，传统“写代码的开发者”仅占现场用户的20%，产品与运营背景的人已占35%，企业主占21%。基础设

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $65,000 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC dropped below $60K amid DXY surge and spot ETF outflows; traders betting 15% relief bounce but macro headwinds (Iran war spending, Fed tightening signals) create genuine volatility.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (BTC near $59K, DXY surges); CoinDesk (spot ETF outflows, slowing accumulation)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Micron (MU) stock remain above $180 through Q3 2026 earnings?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: MU jumped 12% on memory crunch/revenue quadrupling; 700% YoY rally creates profit-taking risk if semiconductor cycle softens or capex plans falter mid-year.

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve cut rates by ≥50bp before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Fed stress test shows $708B loss resilience; White House requesting $87.6B supplemental for Iran war signals fiscal expansion pressure on inflation narrative.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Fed capital stress test, supplemental spending request); macro context on rate path uncertainty

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Qualcomm (QCOM) non-handset revenue exceed 45% of total by 2028?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: QCOM +15% after nearly doubling 2029 non-handset projection; validates AI/automotive pivot but execution risk in 2027-28 is real.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (QCOM doubled non-handset revenue projection for 2029)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Kalshi's valuation reach $50 billion by end of Q2 2027?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Kalshi raised valuation to $40B and is aggressively expanding (sued Illinois over July 1 restrictions); rapid growth and regulatory wins/losses will determine 2027 valuation.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Kalshi $40B valuation, widening lead over Polymarket); Cointelegraph (Kalshi-Illinois lawsuit on prediction market restrictions)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. defense industrial base announce ≥$15 billion in new missile/munition capacity expansion by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: SEC filings (Raytheon, Lockheed Martin, Northrop Grumman), Bloomberg/Reuters press releases
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: White House pressing defense CEOs for expanded output amid Iran tensions and missile stockpile concerns; market has not fully priced major capex announcements.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Trump meets defense CEOs as Iran operations strain U.S. missile stockpiles; direct Pentagon pressure signals imminent contract awards.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Apple announce mass production of first foldable iPhone by September 1, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Apple press release, SEC filing, or confirmed reporting by Bloomberg/WSJ/MacRumors
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Chinese sources (36Kr) reporting July mass production timeline before English media; historical pattern shows iPhone foldable rumors overblown, but July date is specific.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: FLAG: 36Kr reported Apple foldable iPhone mass production in late July 2026—predates English media coverage; if confirmed by Reuters/Bloomberg by late June, probability should rise sharply.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Ethereum Foundation leadership upheaval result in ≥3 C-level departures by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official Ethereum Foundation announcements, LinkedIn departures/appointments, on-chain governance disclosures
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CoinDesk flagged 'upheaval' with bullish crypto sentiment, but institutional risk of fractured leadership is underpriced; resolution depends on public announcements.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk: Upheaval at Ethereum Foundation has some of crypto's biggest names feeling bullish—suggests significant organizational changes in progress.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Anthropic win a trade secret lawsuit against Alibaba by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. court filing/judgment, arbitration award, settlement disclosure
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC obtained letter accusing Alibaba of largest known distillation attack on Anthropic; legal outcome carries massive AI IP precedent, but enforcement timeline is long.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Anthropic accuses Alibaba of 'brazenly' and 'illicitly' extracting AI capabilities in largest known distillation attack; escalating AI IP tensions.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. housing starts exceed 1.5M annualized units in Q3 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: U.S. Census Bureau housing starts data (monthly release, third month of Q3)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump canceled signing of bipartisan housing bill, signaling regulatory delay; market underestimating recession risk in housing completions vs. macro stimulus.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC: Trump cancels bipartisan housing bill signing; political friction on housing policy creates near-term supply constraint uncertainty.

investment_theses.thesis: Defense & aerospace capex cycle inflates Q3-Q4 2026 as Iran escalation and U.S. missile stockpile concerns force Pentagon to unlock budget; overweight LMT, RTX, NOC.
supporting_signals: CNBC: White House requesting $87.6B supplemental for Iran war and pressing defense CEOs for expanded output
Trump-defense CEO meeting signals imminent contract acceleration
Missile stockpile depletion concerns create genuine capex urgency (not just budget talk)
investment_theses.counter_view: Congressional budget gridlock (Trump housing bill cancellation, GOP tensions) could delay Defense appropriations into late 2026 or 2027.
investment_theses.expression: Long LMT, RTX call spreads (Jul/Aug strike, 2-3 month duration); or equal-weight defensives/aerospace vs. SPY

investment_theses.thesis: Memory semiconductor supercycle extends into Q4 2026 on AI chip demand + data center capex boom; Micron's 700% YTD run underprices continued margin expansion until Q4 saturation.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Micron +12% on memory crunch, revenue quadrupled, 700% YTD surge
AI model inference scaling (3D generation, medical AI adoption from 36Kr) requires sustained DRAM/NAND
Qualcomm +15% on non-handset (AI/auto) uplift confirms chip capex secular tailwind
investment_theses.counter_view: Micron's valuation is stretched; mean-reversion and inventory normalization in H2 2026 could trigger 20-30% drawdown.
investment_theses.expression: Long MU Sept 2026 $200 calls; or pair long MU / short NAND ETF (if available) to isolate memory cycle vs. foundry risk

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin technical support at $60K holds into June 2026 as Iran war fiscal stimulus (not tightening) dominates macro narrative; DXY weakness reverses, reopening BTC bid.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: BTC near $59K but traders anticipate 15% relief bounce
White House $87.6B supplemental spending (Iran war) signals fiscal expansion, not QT
Spot BTC ETF outflows are tactical (profit-taking), not structural capitulation
investment_theses.counter_view: DXY surge persists; Iran escalation triggers risk-off and USD safe haven demand, pushing BTC lower into $55K.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC 2026 Jun/Jul $62K-$65K call spreads; or BTC/DXY ratio trade (long BTC perps, short DXY futures) to isolate currency thesis

investment_theses.thesis: Kalshi prediction market equity appreciates 25-50% by EOY 2026 as litigation wins and Illinois court challenge (July 1 deadline) boost regulatory clarity and user acquisition.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Kalshi $40B valuation, widening lead over Polymarket (valuation momentum)
Cointelegraph: Kalshi sues Illinois over prediction market restrictions; July 1 effective date creates high-stakes legal inflection
Crypto-backed political candidates winning primaries (Fairshake PAC, $8M spend) signals demand for prediction markets as political infrastructure
investment_theses.counter_view: Regulatory losses (Illinois ruling upheld) or competitor (Polymarket) fundraising at higher valuation could dilute Kalshi equity gains.
investment_theses.expression: Secondary share purchases if available (AngelList, Forge, Carta); or synthetic via crypto prediction market ETFs if launched in 2026

investment_theses.thesis: AI chip custom silicon (OpenAI/Broadcom partnership, Qualcomm non-handset AI) outpaces Nvidia's foundry lead into 2027; ETH/BTC ratio compresses as Nvidia margin pressure offsets BTC macro tailwind.
supporting_signals: Hacker News: OpenAI unveils first custom chip built by Broadcom (281 comments, high engagement)
36Kr: AI OPC (One Person Company) culture and 3D generative model funding signals sustained AI capex fragmentation vs. NVDA moat
investment_theses.counter_view: Nvidia's software/CUDA ecosystem durability and memory bandwidth advantage keep foundry competition at bay; NVDA re-rates higher in 2026.
investment_theses.expression: Long QCOM / short NVDA pairs trade; or short NVDA call spreads (sell $200 calls, buy $190 puts, Jun/Jul 2026)
